PASHA ENGINEERING WORKS — IMAGE UPLOAD GUIDE
============================================

Add your design photos to these folders (JPG, PNG, or WEBP):

  public/images/gates/      → Main Gates
  public/images/bathroom/   → Bathroom Doors
  public/images/autobody/   → Auto Body Works
  public/images/others/     → Other Designs

Hero image (homepage banner):
  public/images/hero.jpg

After adding or removing photos:
  1. Run:  npm run images
  2. Restart dev server (or rebuild for Netlify)

Tips for Netlify:
  - Use lowercase filenames (e.g. gate-design-01.jpg)
  - Avoid spaces in filenames
  - No need to edit React code — the site reads folders automatically
